# meltcloud_elastic_share (Data Source)

An Elastic Share grants a consuming organization a slice of an Elastic Capacity, expressed in cores, memory, and disk.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# get elastic share by ID
data "meltcloud_elastic_share" "example" {
  id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Internal ID of the Elastic Share on meltcloud

### Read-Only

- `capacity_id` (Number) ID of the parent Elastic Capacity
- `consuming_organization_uuid` (String) UUID of the consuming Organization
- `cores` (Number) Number of cores granted to the consuming organization
- `disk_gb` (Number) Disk in GB granted to the consuming organization
- `memory_mb` (Number) Memory in MB granted to the consuming organization
- `name` (String) Name of the Elastic Share
